name: Win-Back
description: Offer a unique per-contact discount code to recently-cancelled subscribers via email + SMS.

args.subject: Win-Back agent initiated
args.body: Created unique coupon code {{coupon.code}} — valid for 14 days.

args.subject: A small thank-you from Bright Smile — 20% off whenever you're ready
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We noticed you cancelled your subscription with Bright Smile Dental — no worries at all, life gets busy and we know dental visits aren't always top of mind.

If you ever want to come back for a cleaning, a consult, or just to say hi, here's a little thank-you: 20% off your next visit.

Code: {{coupon.code}}

It's good for the next 14 days, and you can use it on anything from a cleaning to an emergency visit. Our goal has always been to make dental care feel a little less scary — free new-patient consults, painless cleanings, modern tech, zero pressure.

If something about your last experience wasn't right, I'd genuinely want to hear about it — just hit reply and it lands straight with our team.

Take care of that smile,
The Bright Smile Dental team

Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — quick heads up that your 20% off code {{coupon.code}} expires in about a week. If you'd like to come back in, we'd love to see you. No pressure either way!

args.subject: Win-Back agent sequence complete
args.body: Delivered email + SMS with coupon {{coupon.code}}. Redemption (if any) will surface as a payment event on the workspace's Stripe Connect account.
